description: A vertical OSHA winter safety graphic (same design as the agency's other winter-weather card) built on a wintry photograph. The photo shows two white snowplow/utility trucks with orange front plow blades driving down a snow-covered, tree-lined road during active snowfall, headlights on, surrounded by snow-laden bare trees and a white overcast landscape. In the upper-left is the blue 'OSHA' logo. The lower portion fades to a dark navy gradient and carries large bold white italic serif text 'WINTER SAFETY' flanked by dashes, with the URL 'OSHA.GOV/WINTER-WEATHER' beneath in white caps. The style is clean public-service design with a cold blue-and-white palette. This is a DOL/OSHA workplace winter-weather safety message for employers and workers, not an immigration meme. Designed agency graphic (photo with branded text overlay).
